name: Download and explain documentation
prompt: Fetch the documentation page at https://docs.netlify.com/build/async-workloads/overview/ and write a clear explanation of what it covers to /tmp/axis-e2e-explain-docs/explanation.md. Your explanation should include: what async workloads are, what problems they solve, and how they relate to Netlify's build system. Create the directory if it doesn't exist.

judge.check: File /tmp/axis-e2e-explain-docs/explanation.md was created with substantive content
Explanation accurately describes what async workloads are based on the documentation
Explanation covers what problems async workloads solve and how they relate to Netlify builds
Explanation is well-structured and readable (uses headings, paragraphs, or lists)
